title: Errors, Cleanup, and Root-Cause Debugging · Guided Runtime Studio
summary: Diagnose malformed records and failed operations while keeping cleanup, user recovery, and causal evidence intact. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a recoverable import and diagnostics workflow while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Differentiate syntax, reference, type, range, aggregate, DOM, and domain errors by evidence and recovery boundary.
Throw Error objects with stable messages, structured context, and preserved causes without exposing secrets.
Place try, catch, and finally around the smallest recoverable boundary without swallowing failures or overriding control flow.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

// javascript-basics cumulative stakeholder program.
